material_claims.claim: The captured Jose Eduardo lore repository is treated, under operator adjudication, as an ATMTA-affiliated canonical nomenclature and taxonomy source for in-universe Star Atlas concepts.
The adopted lore taxonomy is a historical snapshot at captured commit 22555f277eb1496e34c0839c8f1f382842bd1d2b rather than a guarantee of current upstream completeness.
Official Star Atlas publications may supply newer lore absent from the snapshot, while historical source titles and legacy classifications remain preserved as evidence and aliases.
Lore taxonomy authority controls governance, product release state, real-world institutional history, or the wording of preserved historical sources.
material_claims.reason: The authority model is explicitly limited to in-universe nomenclature and classification.

material_claims.claim: ATMTA affiliation establishes page-level authorship or independently verifies every narrative assertion in the personal repository.
material_claims.reason: Operator-confirmed affiliation and lore responsibility support authority scope but do not replace page-level provenance or conflict review.

known_limitations: Reader-oriented pages for most ingested lore entities have not yet been consolidated.
Direct mappings for CORE and The Voice of Iris remain deferred.
Canon versus generated-docs divergences and broken upstream references remain visible for source-level review.
